name: Golden Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the pumpkin, granulated sugar, brown sugar, eggs, and oil until well combined.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, corn meal, baking soda, salt, and pumpkin pie spice.
3. Alternately add the dry ingredients mixture and sour cream to the pumpkin mixture, mixing well after each addition.
4. Add water, raisins, and pecans to the pumpkin mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Pour the batter evenly into two greased 9 x 5 inch loaf pans.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for about 1 hour and 10 minutes.
7. Allow cooling for 10 minutes before removing from the pans. If using smaller loaf pans, bake for 40 to 45 minutes.
